associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Argyll, Scotland
associatedMedia.description: Eilean Donan Castle is a small tidal island where three sea lochs meet Loch Duich, Loch Long, and Loch Alsh, Highlands, Scotand. https://pin.it/43Fh9OT

associatedMedia.headline: Eilean Donan Castle, Donan, Isle of Skye, Scotland
associatedMedia.description:
History
The name Eilean Donan, or island of Donan, is most probably called after the 6th century Irish Saint, Bishop Donan who came to Scotland around 580 AD. There are several churches dedicated to Donan in the area and it is likely that he formed a small cell or community on the island during the late 7th century.

associatedMedia.headline: WHY IS IT THAT MY HEART STIRS WHEN I HEAR BAGPIPES?

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybella Stewart於1205年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland38歲，母親Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus31歲。她於大約1240年與Angus Crom MacKenneth在蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1267年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾廷哈梅享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybella Stewart于1205年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland38岁，母亲Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus31岁。她于大约1240年与Angus Crom MacKenneth在苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1267年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾廷哈梅享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Sybella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name, apparently derived from   Isabella   by the dropping of the initial vowel.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybella Stewart was born in 1205, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland, was 38 and her mother, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, was 31. She married Angus Crom MacKenneth about 1240, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1267, in Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybella Stewart est née en 1205, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Angus Crom MacKenneth environ 1240, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1267, à Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybella Stewart 1205 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland 38 und ihre Mutter Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus 31. Sie hat um 1240 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland Angus Crom MacKenneth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybella Stewart è nata il nel 1205 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Angus Crom MacKenneth circa 1240, nel Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1267, nel Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybella Stewartが1205年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotlandは38歳，母Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angusは31歳であった。約1240年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでAngus Crom MacKennethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1267年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアウィッティンジェハムで62歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybella Stewart(이)가 1205년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Angus Crom MacKenneth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 휘틴그함에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Sc: Paisley Abbey, Paisley, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybella Stewart nasceu em 1205, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Angus Crom MacKenneth aproximadamente 1240, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1267, em Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybella Stewart родилась в 1205 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Angus Crom MacKenneth около 1240 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1267 г. в местности уиттингэам, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybella Stewart nació en 1205, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Fitz Alan 3rd High Steward of Scotland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Beatrix Bethoc Gille Christ de angus, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Angus Crom MacKenneth aproximadamente 1240, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1267, en Whittingehame, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
